title: Les gens du Monde
overview: Created in 1944, Le Monde soon celebrates its 70th anniversary. The film considers the closest upheavals of the press, from blogging to tweeting, print to the web...  A vivid and sensitive portrayal of one of the most prestigious world press titles, and a turbulent profession.
